sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12981" key="a)pokubista/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποκῠβιστάω</orth>, <sense id="n12981.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plunge headlong off</tr_> a place, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εἰς ὕδωρ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">73</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (dub.).</sense> </entryFree>
